resources.string: SafeType parental monitoring service. Reads on-screen messages from chat apps and sends them to your parent\'s dashboard. This service is part of a parental safety tool.
Parental monitoring is running. Your parent can see your messages.
Shows when SafeType parental monitoring is active

This app was installed by your parent to help keep you safe online. It monitors messages in chat apps and alerts your parent to potentially harmful content.

What this app does:
• Reads messages in WhatsApp, Instagram, Snapchat, and SMS
• Sends message data to your parent's dashboard
• Logs what you type on the keyboard

This is a university research project on child online safety.
